title: Iron's Spellbooks - Eldritch to Sculk
description: Sculkify the other Eldritch spell icons, just as it should be!
body:
I was a bit dissatisfied with the icon/textures of some of the Eldritch spells due to how Ender-y they look.



This resource pack simply recolors the icons and effects of Abyssal Shroud, Eldritch Blast, Planar Sight, and Telekinesis into sculk-themed to match the other two spells (Sculk Tentacles and Sonic Boom), making it so that Eldritch = Sculk.



As a bonus, I added a cross on the Fortified effect (v1 only), as well as as changed the color of the Eldritch Blast spell to match it with the icon changes well.

I intended this to be a personal resource pack but I figured that I'd share it here, because other people may want something like this too
